sections.paragraph: m. const. st. מַעֲשַׂר, with suff. מַעַשְׂרֹו, plur. מַעְשְׂרֹות (from the noun עָשָׂר, עֶשֶׂר), tithes, Gen 14:20 Deu 14:23, 28 Deu 14:28 26:12 . מַעֲשַׂר הַמַּעֲשֵׂר “tithes of tithes,” Neh 10:39. שְׁנַת־הַמַּעֲשֵׂר “the year of tithe,” every third year, in which the tithes were to be used in providing hospitable entertainments at home, Deu 26:12.
